metadata.source: Generated from DoBIH v18.4 summit points (all registered hill lists, deduplicated) and Natural England Lake District National Park boundary
metadata.method: Summit-centred hill profiles: generate one soft radial footprint around each summit, shape it by height and nearby summits, and clip Lake District hills to the National Park boundary. These are visual hill-lighting profiles, not authoritative geomorphological, route or land-boundary data.
